subject: Exporting particles back to RELION after M refinement (MCore)
body:
Hi all,

I have refined particles with MCore and I want to classify them further in 
RELION. What is the correct way to do this?

First, I tried using the particles.star file from 
M/species/particle/particles.star in WarpTools ts_export_particles. This 
STAR file is, however, not compatible. 

Should I use the STAR file created by RELION (the same one I used to create 
the species in M) instead? Does this workflow use the updated XML files for 
tilt series alignment? Are the updated particle alignment parameters in the 
M/species/particle/particles.star file relevant here?

Cheers,
Juha
